title: School of Design | Galgotias University
content: Empowering Designers of Tomorrow The School of Design is a vibrant, interdisciplinary space where creativity meets purpose. We offer future-facing programs in Product Design, Interior Design, Visual Communication, Advertising Graphic & Web Design, Fashion Design, Interaction Design, and Design Research & Insights—combining hands-on learning with industry exposure and research-driven practice. What sets us apart? We go beyond aesthetics. Our students work on real-world challenges, engage with communities, and collaborate across disciplines. From first-year studios to final-year capstones, learning here is immersive, inquiry-based, and innovation-led. Why Choose Us? Your Future in Design Our graduates shape impactful careers in design consultancies, global studios, startups, and social innovation. Whether you build products, design spaces, craft experiences, or conduct design research—you’ll be ready to lead with purpose. This is more than a design school. It’s a launchpad for creative changemakers. Program: B.Pharm Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business UP Government University Grants Commission All India Council for Technical Education The Bar Council of India Indian Nursing Council National Council for Teacher Education.
